sections.title: Learn
sections.description: Conceptual overviews of Loopstack — what it is, how the workflow engine works, core abstractions (workflows, tools, documents), and the Studio UI.

sections.title: Build
sections.description: Step-by-step guides for building with Loopstack — getting started, workflow fundamentals, AI/LLM integration, workflow patterns, and third-party integrations.

sections.title: Extend
sections.description: How to add custom LLM providers and OAuth providers to the Loopstack registry.

sections.title: Reference
sections.description: API and configuration reference — module options, environment variables, YAML schemas for workflows and documents, and import paths.

sections.title: Registry
sections.description: The Loopstack Registry — a curated collection of npm packages providing feature modules, standalone tools, and example workflows.

sections.title: Registry — Features
sections.description: Official Loopstack modules providing LLM integrations, OAuth, human-in-the-loop, Git/GitHub tools, secrets management, and more.

sections.title: Registry — Examples
sections.description: Example workflows demonstrating Loopstack patterns: chat, tool calling, agents, HITL, structured output, sub-workflows, and integrations.
